name: CellGrid

unions.name: CellGrid
unions.comment:
A value of type `CellGrid a` is a rectangular array
of values of type a.

unions.name: CellType
unions.comment:
A cell can be in the interior of the grid,
on an edge, on in a cornder

aliases.name: CellRenderer
aliases.comment:
CellRenderer is a record that provides the information --
cellSize, defaultColor, and the function cellColorizer --
that are needed to render a cell to SVG.
aliases.type: { cellSize : Basics.Float, cellColorizer : a -> CellGrid.ColorValue, defaultColor : CellGrid.ColorValue }

values.name: cellAtIndex
values.comment: Return the Maybe value of the cell at (i,j) from grid
values.type: ( Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> CellGrid.CellGrid a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: classifyCell
values.comment:
return the type of the cell at location (i,j).  Thus
classifyCell grid (0,0) = Corner

values.name: index
values.comment:
Conversely, `index (nRows, nCols) k` is the
2D array index `(i,j)` of the element al address `k`

values.name: indices
values.comment:
Return a list of all indices (i,j) of a grid.
Useful for mapping.

values.name: location
values.comment:
Consider a 1D array of elements which represents
a 2D array with n rows. Then `location  n (i,j)`
is the index in the 1D array of the correspondng
element in the 2D array at location (i,j)`

values.name: mapWithIndex
values.comment: Transform a CellGrid a with a function ((Int, Int) -> a -> a)
values.type: (( Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> a -> a) -> CellGrid.CellGrid a -> CellGrid.CellGrid a

values.name: renderAsHtml
values.comment: Render a cell grid as Html
values.type: CellGrid.CellRenderer a -> CellGrid.CellGrid a -> Html.Html msg

values.name: setValue
values.comment: Set the value of the cell at location (i,j)
values.type: CellGrid.CellGrid a -> ( Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> a -> CellGrid.CellGrid a
